import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut count = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    -1
  end
  if b == 97 or b == 101 or b == 105 or b == 111 or b == 117
    count = count + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

print("vowels=#{count}")
